raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup (5x5x8 cm) is within reach of the right arm and there is sufficient lateral clearance on either side to close the claw without colliding with box_2; removing the cup is necessary because it blocks the front side of box_2 and could be bumped while extracting box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted off the table, clearing the front area near box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (front-right clear area away from both boxes)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and a stable, obstacle-free region of the table is available far enough from box_1 and box_2 to prevent interference during subsequent box manipulation.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is placed upright on the table in a clear area and released, no longer obstructing the workspace near the boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The left arm can reach the accessible front face of box_1 and apply steadying contact without contacting box_2; this stabilization is needed because box_1 is large (30 cm) and adjacent to box_2 on its right side.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is constrained against unintended rotation/drag while the robot prepares a two-arm lift."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left side and front of box_1 are accessible; the robot can position both end-effectors to clamp/support box_1 from opposing sides (or side+front) without using claws (box size exceeds claw limit), and there is enough vertical clearance to lift without scraping against box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely held and supported by both end-effectors, fully under robot control and ready to be lifted from the table."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup (5x5x8 cm) is within reach of the right arm and there is sufficient lateral clearance on either side to close the claw without colliding with box_2; removing the cup is necessary because it blocks the front side of box_2 and could be bumped while extracting box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted off the table, clearing the front area near box_2.

parsed_json.Target: table (front-right clear area away from both boxes)
parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and a stable, obstacle-free region of the table is available far enough from box_1 and box_2 to prevent interference during subsequent box manipulation.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is placed upright on the table in a clear area and released, no longer obstructing the workspace near the boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: The left arm can reach the accessible front face of box_1 and apply steadying contact without contacting box_2; this stabilization is needed because box_1 is large (30 cm) and adjacent to box_2 on its right side.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is constrained against unintended rotation/drag while the robot prepares a two-arm lift.

parsed_json.Precondition: The left side and front of box_1 are accessible; the robot can position both end-effectors to clamp/support box_1 from opposing sides (or side+front) without using claws (box size exceeds claw limit), and there is enough vertical clearance to lift without scraping against box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely held and supported by both end-effectors, fully under robot control and ready to be lifted from the table.
